name: Alligator Energy Limited
analysis: AGE has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 20% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (2.9× the 20-day average) — real participation. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$0.0450, stop A$0.0307, target A$0.0530 (0.56:1) — then trail it.
